name: Andean Silver Limited
analysis: ASL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 14% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.3500, stop A$1.6632, target A$2.5900 (0.35:1) — then trail it.
